subcodes.first_line: O Composer of the pearls of inner meanings! Thy verses, like unto the Pleiades, have shed their lustrous radiance in this celestial sphere [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظم لئالی معانی نظمت چون عقد ثریا در این سماء شعشعهء روشنی نمود ....
subcodes.subjects: @music and singing, @poems and quotation from poetry, @praise and encouragement
